dimensions.label: Source-cited answers
dimensions.why: Agents need inspectable evidence before acting.

dimensions.label: Same-source evidence anchors
dimensions.why: Quote or span anchors reduce polished unsupported answers.

dimensions.label: No-LLM default recall
dimensions.why: Default query path should stay fast, cheap, and deterministic.

dimensions.label: Temporal context
dimensions.why: Agents must distinguish current truth from historical facts.

dimensions.label: Entity and graph recall
dimensions.why: Memory should connect facts, entities, code areas, and decisions.

dimensions.label: Governed learning
dimensions.why: Agents should observe and propose, not silently promote truth.

dimensions.label: Conflict-aware decision gate
dimensions.why: Conflicting memory should block unsafe autonomous action.

dimensions.label: Agent handoff UX
dimensions.why: The agent needs trust, gaps, conflicts, next action, and validation.

dimensions.label: Token budget control
dimensions.why: A brain packet should fit bounded context instead of replaying memory.

dimensions.label: Lean self-hosted core
dimensions.why: Core should avoid unnecessary services and vendor lock-in.

reporting_rule: Capability scores are normalized feature ratings based on public documentation. They are not latency, throughput, token-count, or accuracy claims. Publish cross-system performance numbers only with a reproducible harness, dataset, model configuration, provider configuration, and hardware.
